title: Oath Maker
description: Adds the Oath Maker origin that can create oaths with other players in order to buff them
body:
> **PRIMARY: Select Command**
> - Open a GUI that has right-clickable buttons for each of the commands you can use on your subjects.
> - Commands that have their buff changed based on your selection mode are listed as such, (all/single).
> - Each of your commands have a separate cooldown, two minutes, and a separate duration, (30s/60s).

> **PASSIVE [+]: Available Commands**
> 
> - Fight: (20%/40%) increased damage, (0.5/1) hearts of damage removed every hit
> - Live: (2/4) hearts of damage healed, (2/4) extra hearts
> - Run: (20%/40%) movement speed boost
> - Haste: (20%/40%) mining speed boost
> - Locate: Glowing effect
> - Explode **SINGLE TARGET ONLY**: Explode your selected subject and deal 44 damage--the same as a charged creeper--to everyone, but you, in a 6 block radius.
> - Goto **SINGLE TARGET ONLY**: Teleport to your selected target with a three second cancelable charge
> - Bring: Teleport your selected target(s) to you with a three second cancelable charge
> - Terminate **SINGLE TARGET ONLY**: Remove your oath with your selected targett


> **SECONDARY: Select Target**
> - Get a list of all of your currently alive subjects, alongside their `selection ID`. 
> - This also shows your `Oath Maker ID`
> - You can use the command, `/trigger oathmaker-selection set x`, (replace x is your subjects `selection ID`) to swap your current subject.
> - - Using 0 for a `selection ID` will make you select every subject, some commands do not work with all targeting.

> **PASSIVE [+]: Oath Creation**
> - You can have other players use the command, `/trigger oathmaker-create_oath set x`, (replace x with your `Oath Maker ID`) to create an oath with you.
> - There is no limit to how many oaths you can have.

> **PASSIVE [-]: Connected Soul**
> - When you first spawn in, you suffer from a 80% decrease in stats related to combat. Making oaths lessens this decrease to only 20% at 3 oaths, oaths only count if they are online and alive.
> - You get particle effects and a message whenever your oath count changes.
> - Combat related stats are as follows: armor, armor toughness, attack damage, attack speed.
> - E.g, having only one oath sets the 80% decrease of the above stats to a 60% decrease
